assessment.note: Deficiency-as-request: he names missing examples of excellent junior-level work, signalling strong role-bar confusion and mild growth blockage.

new_queue.label: Feedback translated
new_queue.name: What changed in your day-to-day after the last round of feedback?
new_queue.description: Checks whether prior feedback became new behavior, process, or output rather than staying conceptual.

new_queue.label: Quality misses
new_queue.name: Where do you think your work most often misses the bar?
new_queue.description: Names the recurring quality gap in a way that can lead to a concrete calibration discussion.

new_queue.label: Working definition
new_queue.name: How do you decide when a design is ready to ship?
new_queue.description: Reveals his internal threshold for done and whether it matches the team's expectation.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would you like to have changed by our next check-in?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific commitment for the next cycle without opening a new topic.
